_comment: No API parameters are hardcoded anywhere in src/ai/. Every value the client uses to build a request comes from this file. The API key itself is NEVER stored here -- see api_key_env_var.

_notes.temperature: Kept low (0.1), not 0, because Gemini's extraction still benefits from a little flexibility across varied PDF layouts -- but this NEVER touches the matching engine, which stays 100% rule-based Spark regardless of what Gemini returns.
_notes.future_providers: Adding Azure OpenAI or Claude later means a new config/ai/<provider>.json plus a new src/ai/<provider>_client.py implementing AIClient. No other file changes.
